title: Elexon to launch smart data repository to support smarter energy system
snippet:
Elexon will launch its smart data repository this autumn to improve data access, support innovation and accelerate energy system flexibility

The post Elexon to launch smart data repository to support smarter energy system appeared first o
ai_summary: Elexon's smart data repository launch will improve data access and transparency in the UK energy system, potentially benefiting tem's operations around settlement, balancing, and market participation.
ai_reasoning: Elexon is a key regulator in tem's operating environment (BSC, balancing mechanism, half-hourly settlement). A major data infrastructure upgrade affects how tem and competitors access market information and may create operational efficiencies or trading opportunities.
